---
title: "16 Molecular Docking"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Global rendering configuration for the whole project
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.dpi = 300,
  fig.align = "center"
)
```

# Package Loading
library(tidyverse)

# Global Parameters
affinity_cut <- -5.0 # Binding energy threshold

# Data Import
# Import core protein structure and active ingredient structure files

# Data Analysis
# 1. Protein pretreatment (dehydration and hydrogenation)
# 2. Compound structure optimization
# 3. Molecular docking calculation
# 4. Binding energy screening and hydrogen bond/hydrophobic statistics

# Visualization
# 2D & 3D molecular docking interaction plots

# Result Export
# Output docking score statistical table

# Result Description
# Explain structural pretreatment standards and effective binding criteria
